name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: She said WHAT?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
We need to BACK THE BADGE PeterYou need to know what the radical socialists are saying - _**and**_ _**what they actually believe** -_ because the liberal media is never going to report it! The liberals aren't exactly hiding what they think. Rashida Tlaib just tweeted to her followers some of the most **vile,** **disgusting, anti-police rhetoric **you've ever seen, when she said that policing is **INHERENTLY, INTENTIONALLY RACIST, **and called it "government-funded murder." [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdjdyjl-ahkdjtlkr-r/) [[ LET'S SHOW RASHIDA TLAIB ] - Wisconsin Backs The Badge](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdjdyjl-ahkdjtlkr-y/) There's something else, though, that matters to me. I'm a FATHER and SON of former police officers.**Backing the Blue isn't a slogan in my house. It's a way of life.**The men and women of our community police forces deserve our _gratitude_ , not Rashida Tlaib's hate speech.This is a HUGE moment where we need to STEP UP and show our law enforcement that **WE'VE GOT THEIR BACK.** I'm doing it in Congress. Will you join me to show them that they've got support LOUDER and STRONGER than the rioters, the looters, and their radical allies in Congress?[**Click here and SUPPORT our law enforcement!**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdjdyjl-ahkdjtlkr-j/) -Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdjdyjl-ahkdjtlkr-t/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdjdyjl-ahkdjtlkr-i/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-mdjdyjl-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-d) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-mdjdyjl-ahkdjtlkr-h/)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I'm punching back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Governors Association
body:
The media lied, and they lied, and they lied.

| | |
---

Once again, the biased corporate media is spinning the facts to vilify GOP leaders, and this time, they're coming after me. 60 Minutes recently aired a deceptively edited video to manufacture a scandal because the Left can't stand that I refused to shut down Florida.

name: Team AOC
subject: Honestly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We really could use your help today.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210416-2010-header&t=1&akid=2010%2E2526796%2E0WUSX9)
Honestly, a lot has been happening this month. With all that’s going on, we haven’t been focused on the usual campaign fundraising priorities. And that’s okay!
Alexandria has spent a lot of time in the district these past few weeks, visiting with the families and business owners who have been affected by two massive fires in Jackson Heights, Queens. Together with this team, she helped raise over $28,000 collectively to get community members affected by the fires back on their feet.
Then, Alexandria and this team helped raise $26,613 for the Nevada Democratic Party to help make up for the funds that the establishment staff transferred after all five leadership positions in the Party were swept up by progressive DSA candidates.
On top of all that, with the pandemic continuing to ravage communities, we’ve expanded our Homework Helpers program to include extracurricular activities for children who need extra help and hobbies while schools are closed.
**Obviously, we haven’t been focused on fundraising for our campaign. And, again, that’s okay. Alexandria’s focus will always be on supporting our community and delivering results for working families across the country.**
**But, it does leave us with a pretty big gap in fundraising at the moment, and that’s why we really could use your help today.**[If you are able, can you chip in $3 right now to help us close this gap in fundraising and power our campaign forward?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8530?refcode=em20210416-2010&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2010%2E2526796%2E0WUSX9)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8530?refcode=em20210416-2010&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2010%2E2526796%2E0WUSX9)**
We’ve only raised about a third as much in April as we had at this point in March. That’s why we need to have a really big mid-month fundraising surge to ensure we don’t fall too far behind.
Our average donation this month is about $14.43, so it would take somewhere around 18,000 supporters reading this right now chipping in that amount to close the gap completely.
We know that not everyone is in the place to contribute right now, but [if you can be one of the 18,000 people we’re relying on today, it would mean so much. Please click here to contribute and help us close the gap.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8530?refcode=em20210416-2010&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2010%2E2526796%2E0WUSX9)
This team has never let us down before. But, whether or not we close this gap, we have a lot to be proud of in fundraising for the Nevada Democratic Party, communities in Jackson Heights, and expanding our Homework Helpers program. We couldn’t do this important work without your support.
Thank you for all you do,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210416-2010-footer&t=24&refcode2=2010_2526796_0WUSX9&akid=2010%2E2526796%2E0WUSX9)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2010%2E2526796%2E0WUSX9) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2010%2E2526796%2E0WUSX9) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2010%2E2526796%2E0WUSX9)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2010%2E2526796%2E0WUSX9)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2010%2E2526796%2E0WUSX9). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Tim Scott
subject: Please, Peter, I need you to read EVERY WORD
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/v6TtOLXubN

I know you receive lots of emails - but I really think you should
read my thoughts regarding "woke" culture and the intolerant
Left.

Peter,

I know you receive lots of emails - but I really think you should
read my thoughts regarding "woke" culture and the intolerant
Left.

Please read every word. It's important.

These words come directly from my heart and I hope that after
reading my op-ed below,
you will choose to stand with me.
(https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/op-ed/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210405_SM-CZ.101461_tim-scott_t1055294-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210405_please-first-name-i-need-you-to-read-every-word)

STAND WITH ME
(https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/op-ed/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210405_SM-CZ.101461_tim-scott_t1055294-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210405_please-first-name-i-need-you-to-read-every-word)

-Tim
Tim Scott: Let's set the record straight on 'woke supremacy' and
racism
I was criticized in this newspaper last week for saying that
"woke supremacy" is as bad as white supremacy.

My comments, of course, were not comparing the long history of
racial hate to the very short history of wokeism. That would be
ludicrous. I am painfully aware that four centuries of racism,
bigotry and killings does not compare to the nascent woke
movement. As a country, we continue to pay a heavy price for our
original sin.

My comments were a sound-bite-length reaction to yet another
media figure accusing me of being a token for Republicans.
Unfortunately, this isn't the first time I've heard that type of
slur. I spoke out because I am gravely concerned for our future
if we ignore either type of supremacy - both of which are rooted
in racism or discrimination.

Criticism has included the suggestion that I and other
Republicans are "living proof that neither racial nor gender
diversity is a guarantor of progressive, inclusive and
broad-minded thinking. Diversity, much in vogue, has its limits."
In other words, my ideology does not match that which they
prescribe based on my complexion.

That is woke supremacy. It is the "tolerant" left's intolerance
for dissent. It is a progressive conception of diversity that
does not include diversity of thought. It is discrimination
falsely marketed as inclusion.

This isn't the first time the woke folk have come after me. I've
been called a member of the "coon squad" for sharing my story and
conservative vision for America at the 2020 Republican
convention. A former leader of the NAACP called me a
ventriloquist puppet. I've been called an Uncle Tom and a house
n-----, among thousands of other insults.

I am proud to be both a Black man and a Republican. Because of
those aspects of my identity, many critics have ignored things I
have actually done. In the past few years alone, my Republican
colleagues and I secured permanent funding for historically Black
colleges and universities for the first time in history. We've
passed bipartisan legislation to help those battling sickle cell
disease. We've fought for school choice because poor, and often
minority, parents are consistently the ones without choice. And I
helped author the Republican tax reform that lowered taxes for
single moms, doubled the child tax credit and brought Black
unemployment to historic lows. That list barely scratches the
surface.

Critics discount these accomplishments for the Black community
because it conflicts with the caricature they've created of what
it means to be Black and to be a Republican.

But the victims of woke supremacy aren't just Republicans. After
a recent vote against her fellow Democrats' attempt to pass a
job-killing minimum-wage hike during the pandemic, my friend and
colleague Sen. Kyrsten Sinema (D-Ariz.) received so many death
threats that she had to increase security for herself and her
partner. I've received similar threats. A man - a "woke" Black
man - is to be sentenced this month for threatening to gut me
"like a fish" and blow me away with his rifle.

Woke culture is speeding our country toward ideological and
literal segregation. Already, Columbia University has decided to
host segregated graduation celebrations based on race or
socioeconomic status. We are living in a society that has allowed
"autonomous zones" that effectively prohibit law enforcement from
protecting people from crime, and campus "safe spaces" to protect
students from others' opinions.

Carving out public spaces for people of only one race or
mind-set? Since when is separate but equal back in vogue?

Two wrongs don't make a right.

When you give license for one person or group of people to
discriminate, you give license for everyone to discriminate.
Dividing society along racial lines is everything leaders in the
civil rights era fought against, yet leaders of the woke movement
are attempting to codify discrimination in law, including by
Democrats setting aside funding exclusively for non-White farmers
in their recent stimulus package. Blood wasn't shed on the Edmund
Pettus Bridge or the streets of Birmingham so that we could
reinvent the mistakes of our past.

Six years ago, Rep. John Lewis (D-Ga.), who was not just a civil
rights icon but also my friend, asked me to co-chair the march to
Selma on the 50th anniversary of Bloody Sunday. When I think of
my vision for America, I think about standing shoulder to
shoulder on that bridge with John and Presidents Barack Obama and
George W. Bush, walking forward together.

So, we collectively have a choice: We can continue down the path
of toxic woke mandates and virtue signaling that themselves
create discrimination, segregation and hate, or we can choose to
create equality of opportunity and access to the American Dream
for everyone. Because I believe in the goodness of America, I
remain hopeful that we will choose the Opportunity Society.

STAND WITH ME
(https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/op-ed/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210405_SM-CZ.101461_tim-scott_t1055294-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210405_please-first-name-i-need-you-to-read-every-word)

PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: Elisa Cardnell
subject: Did you see my big news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Grassroots PAC
body:
electgrassroots.org [electgrassroots.org]Big news!
Introducing Elect Grassroots PAC
Supporting working class candidates and fighting to end anti-democratic aspects of our political system.
Hi Peter,
I'm excited to introduce you to my new project: Elect Grassroots PAC. Millionaires are overrepresented in Congress, and it's time to elect leaders who know what it's like when policies meet reality in living rooms and checkbooks around the country. Together, we have the power to pool our time, talent, and treasure to create real change in our political system and elect people who work for us, not corporations. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/electgrassroots?refcode=email1b&recurring=1]
Elect Grassroots PAC supports candidates who will champion policies to help the working class and to end anti-democratic practices in our system. Before I ran for Congress, I was a teacher and a Navy veteran. My campaign built a grassroots movement of over 5000 contributions and received more votes than any previous Democratic primary candidate in my district. I know that when we all chip in just a little, it adds up quickly to make a big difference.
And we're doing things a little differently than most PACs. Instead of waiting until our candidates have raised hundreds of thousands of dollars (that they have to raise because they can't drop millions of dollars of their own into a race), we're working with them on fundraising and running their campaign from the very beginning. A $50 donation is enough to host a training session. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/electgrassroots?refcode=train&amount=50]
That's why Elect Grassroots is building a national movement of working class people. When we work together, we have the capability to change our system to work for all of us. Please consider becoming a sustaining supporter for as little as $5 per month. I know that especially after the last year, budgets are tight, so don't worry if you can't chip in right now.
Become a supporter today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/electgrassroots?refcode=email1b&recurring=1]Thanks for all you do,
Elisa Cardnell
Founder/Executive Director
Make a one-time donation [secure.actblue.com/donate/electgrassroots?refcode=email1f]https://www.facebook.com/electgrassroots [https://www.facebook.com/electgrassroots] https://twitter.com/electgrassroots [https://twitter.com/electgrassroots]

Elect Grassroots PAC

Houston, TX 77266

clean_body: The Dems just announced that Michelle Steel's district is on their list of top-targeted districts to FLIP BLUE in 2022. ** . == Friend, The Dems just announced that Michelle Steel 's district as one of their top targets to FLIP BLUE in 2022! In case you didn't hear, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) announced its list of 2022 Republican Targets... front and center on that list is Michelle Steel. We knew the Dems had their sights set on flipping Michelle's district, but this shows just how badly they want to hold onto their slim majority. With their deep pockets ready to spend, Michelle is going to face an unprecedented wave of attack ads and spending against her. Friend, it's critical that she has your support if she is going to remain a strong conservative voice in Congress. == | == To put it another way, with every day that passes, the more the Dems will step up their game to silence Michelle Steel. We can hold them back, but we need every conservative, including you, to be with her every step of the way. == == We can only win this race with your help -- please contribute today. Thank you, Team Steel HQ ==** With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

Democrats have surrendered America’s southern border to the Mexican drug cartels.

We need conservatives in the 50-50 Senate who will fight for border security, but unfortunately, too many Republican Senators still care more about attacking President Trump than they do about keeping America safe.

As a Navy SEAL, I will always put the interests of AMERICA first when I get to the Senate.

clean_body: What’s happening is an utter disgrace. | Peter, Democrats have surrendered America’s southern border to the Mexican drug cartels. We need conservatives in the 50-50 Senate who will fight for border security, but unfortunately, too many Republican Senators still care more about attacking President Trump than they do about keeping America safe. As a Navy SEAL, I will always put the interests of AMERICA first when I get to the Senate. But first I need your help winning the OPEN SENATE RACE in Missouri. Joe Biden has appointed Kamala Harris to manage the crisis on our southern border. God help us. Kamala LAUGHED when a reporter asked her when she would go tour the southern border. She believes our immigration crisis is nothing but a joke. We need Republican fighters in the Senate to take matters into their own hands to fix this border crisis before it’s too late. I’m up for the task. Now I need your help winning this race. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

Friend,

Deep-pocketed Democrats are pouring money into critical special elections happening in states all around the country, and they're counting on you not to fight back. Even in Texas -- they think they can take Texas like they took Georgia.

****
If we don't take a stand now, Democrats will win your state, gerrymander it blue, and KEEP your state under radical leftist control. What does that look like?
* Government mandated vaccine passports
* Sanctuary policies & stimulus checks for illegal immigrants
* Small business lockdowns
* Exorbitant tax hikes
* Skyrocketing crime
* Teacher union tyranny

subject: The ultimate power grab...

body:
Court-packing is just the latest scheme by Democrats in Congress to exert control... [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7a1391a4f1274e3aab0e4a609f9bc730&_e=qp_H1nvk9Hs3Y3I7pjkFa4AlCv_4prTUHtEn0-soXfLuGHMb_ocot3p3M_diAvXlFZJ_wXltJrhRJsqa6sxTDMqtF9M1rNROX9l9bCryuz9-Oa8W5d0YEKalNpjan7mLPUm5j8KjKPvffZB8QdCPPtEOstWaYazSlJ-u_OJsKB3yK4Fmc2yb5qVzBuOPFwiGNr6U45JQeslH_-k6HUa-5IwqmiUt9KOQj6YDLHAD888zF9N3zdkIku6cQXFGG2yUEQv48ZTqQTmZHGFVTXBJHbJ4-ZSw0_ZBxkH_WDf0ig-NtBAXfoUxVLXCmWCqCwsNtvZH7Zup_Lcz6p54j6xorRWPK1LqxZaU0kH6dZgenWaxJ--Whvc7oKc-xRnIK3gDdlq_n31SPX4_wwOkkHMUX4LHIhnXczmwmmPUlKgvVgi9IM95Y42qOhvQk_R64sUkSGuV2Jo-QbfKrPSbzf7Qep9Ra30MSrg7IzYp7KtKUkMaVDoEzQIg_mgj11tsVHhc) Friend — it’s Nancy. I know you’re busy, so I’ll be brief. Did you see the latest power grab attempt by Democrats? Democrats are moving forward with a bill to pack the Supreme Court by adding four more justices, expanding the bench to 13. And honestly, I can’t say that I’m surprised. The radical Left has proven time and again that they don’t care about preserving democracy and respecting America’s founding principles.
No, friend, Democrats only care about one thing: _power_. [**Stop the Democrat Power Grab**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7a1391a4f1274e3aab0e4a609f9bc730&_e=qp_H1nvk9Hs3Y3I7pjkFa4AlCv_4prTUHtEn0-soXfLuGHMb_ocot3p3M_diAvXlFZJ_wXltJrhRJsqa6sxTDMqtF9M1rNROX9l9bCryuz9-Oa8W5d0YEKalNpjan7mLPUm5j8KjKPvffZB8QdCPPtEOstWaYazSlJ-u_OJsKB3yK4Fmc2yb5qVzBuOPFwiGNr6U45JQeslH_-k6HUa-5IwqmiUt9KOQj6YDLHAD888zF9N3zdkIku6cQXFGG2yUEQv48ZTqQTmZHGFVTXBJHbJ4-ZSw0_ZBxkH_WDf0ig_MY96pQo4w_oywXQsQTAQv0Ub11_FHEwy6bkLdW7381BcIVMRD5szPP4LAZnyQJ7jlEkGK-RIXfAzIx4muNDurqoZF1W7g5vy3FNnfilI82aMWcOAIcGa3IBD162Cb_QFY3Aefq5WH-DFZeBXerdXfptkhAQ1TToYnTTAKiZhzEGgV0zAYugz5wCiUQiUyBOl2G9BxETtL9IKLk6SdoaOw) Court-packing is just the latest scheme by Democrats in Congress to exert control over the three branches of government and Americans' way of life. They don’t know how to govern, so instead they will force you to drink their medicine with extreme tactics of government overreach. We saw this coming. And that’s why — ASAP — I signed onto the Keep The 9 bill to STOP the Left from doing exactly this. I didn’t come to Washington to be a spectator, and I’m not about to just sit by and watch this happen. clean_body: Court-packing is just the latest scheme by Democrats in Congress to exert control... Friend — it’s Nancy. I know you’re busy, so I’ll be brief. Did you see the latest power grab attempt by Democrats? Democrats are moving forward with a bill to pack the Supreme Court by adding four more justices, expanding the bench to 13. And honestly, I can’t say that I’m surprised. The radical Left has proven time and again that they don’t care about preserving democracy and respecting America’s founding principles. No, friend, Democrats only care about one thing: power. Court-packing is just the latest scheme by Democrats in Congress to exert control over the three branches of government and Americans' way of life. They don’t know how to govern, so instead they will force you to drink their medicine with extreme tactics of government overreach. We saw this coming. And that’s why — ASAP — I signed onto the Keep The 9 bill to STOP the Left from doing exactly this. I didn’t come to Washington to be a spectator, and I’m not about to just sit by and watch this happen. I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again, it’s time we get the House in order. That’s exactly why we need to ACT NOW to support Conservative Victories in 2022. The stakes are just too high, friend. So I wanted to ask you — I would really appreciate it. Thanks, Nancy Mace | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: GOP Emergency Alert
subject: The situation is DIRE. We’re desperate and we’re begging you for your help. If Dems PACK the Supreme Court...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We face the destruction of every value we hold dear.

Democrats have built a campaign war chest filled with MILLIONS going into this next election cycle. We need to make sure our Conservative candidates have the resources to fight back and win! If we miss this goal, we risk being outraised and outspent AGAIN.

The Dems have introduced legislation to pack the courts.

If Dems PACK the Supreme Court, that will end Trump's Conservative Supreme Court Majority.

If Dems PACK the Supreme Court, that will end ANY chance of enacting Voter ID laws.

[**If Dems PACK the Supreme Court, that will end any chance we have of fighting back against Democrats who currently hold the House, Senate and White House.

_**My name is Rod Doril as - I'm the child of two immigrants from Haiti, a Navy veteran, and I served in the Trump Administration. I'm running for Congress in South Florida because I love America and want to fight for the American Dream.**_
**" No amendment is absolute."**

That's what Joe Biden said when he announced a slate of new gun-grabbing executive orders. **Does someone need to explain to Joe what "shall not be infringed" means?**

| [**SAVE THE SECOND AMENDMENT**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a47467c3ea6340cca8e9d7d412153940&_e=d8geTyxgnUczhPY7FjY3yxJFL7hwhXI37VS-J4ehTejh_6gsFVImqo4R2Qeo75G8XcaOHFep3eF2qgRhWQ-Ivpuy1LVvT5j4lbsKkhSxqjvxAk6G3nj5G1TkY03w_mGYA3wRl1NTAgMF0LpKCRxQuBthUOvLYBohdxKaj7PMcQIssIrfr3E4cIWyvsrshycPYQfiNJHu_Z-kYafoqY-vqXUe5nsZ8wNd45erSc0CNuloOFbim_QHwxpdB0Geo070aj4PXrf2rBq52o6wWs7JGZxcEDwm7l8YFO_HJksrmkgmPBupdOg-NgJlq3yI2cuJ9L-GGiUkCPx8bJjh-JqHj-1tjD0ZmRA9PH_HK9zRBRVRzPTgWvp7z0aUcltaE7A4RGYO1W8xxLCNdJpdPzw6wV4lCYYzbrerfYPlshNHMhQ7tUwxE-bXRi2L7BLDbM_Yx5-lj4j1DwQiYHu_nn2YvWB65kLYtQuG-S8NCkw1nvyVqqCeoGuXl-vKDaAYAdqLiV7hq5Cx2BDuBBrztBIEoQ%3D%3D)
---

We are three months into the Biden Administration, and it's clear that the "bipartisanship" he promised was a complete and utter lie. Instead of working with Republicans to deliver results for the American people, Joe is on pace to **sign more executive orders than any other president since the 1930s.**

This latest attempt is just the beginning for the Democrats - **they will fight tooth and nail to turn law -abiding gun owners into criminals.**

Friend' these attempts to undermine our freedom will only increase crime and make us less safe. **We must fight back** against this blatant threat to our constitutional rights.

[**SAVE THE SECOND AMENDMENT**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a47467c3ea6340cca8e9d7d412153940&_e=d8geTyxgnUczhPY7FjY3yxJFL7hwhXI37VS-J4ehTejh_6gsFVImqo4R2Qeo75G8XcaOHFep3eF2qgRhWQ-Ivpuy1LVvT5j4lbsKkhSxqjvxAk6G3nj5G1TkY03w_mGYA3wRl1NTAgMF0LpKCRxQuBthUOvLYBohdxKaj7PMcQIssIrfr3E4cIWyvsrshycPYQfiNJHu_Z-kYafoqY-vqXUe5nsZ8wNd45erSc0CNuloOFbim_QHwxpdB0Geo070aj4PXrf2rBq52o6wWs7JGZxcEDwm7l8YFO_HJksrmkgmPBupdOg-NgJlq3yI2cuJzFAR55RSsQTzpUZ0ZF-iKdptLc0vNErQKLXITTNRA9R73juYnkr31g8TVpo3V3uVkQBDa0QW9dI-hTADsuNrsYjQfp1FkwPPJHqbLciIskszzYsa38aJSQF6-fpc4jcy_-uz-A5WvrU8cwHTlUUhL9KTrbl_J29U5D1aqEzNC5EZJE4XoYorM-nwtT685B4ss9QJZ6LR0db8h77U8ZRyrQ%3D%3D)

I'm running for Congress to stop this mrafdness and protect the rights of the American people. But I need your support to continue fighting for you. [_Will you step up and contribute to my campaign?_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a47467c3ea6340cca8e9d7d412153940&_e=d8geTyxgnUczhPY7FjY3yxJFL7hwhXI37VS-J4ehTejh_6gsFVImqo4R2Qeo75G8XcaOHFep3eF2qgRhWQ-Ivpuy1LVvT5j4lbsKkhSxqjvxAk6G3nj5G1TkY03w_mGYA3wRl1NTAgMF0LpKCRxQuBthUOvLYBohdxKaj7PMcQIssIrfr3E4cIWyvsrshycPYQfiNJHu_Z-kYafoqY-vqXUe5nsZ8wNd45erSc0CNuloOFbim_QHwxpdB0Geo070aj4PXrf2rBq52o6wWs7JGZxcEDwm7l8YFO_HJksrmkgmPBupdOg-NgJlq3yI2cuJrNu7YjYAjKhGQiTufIsweZYXwDSPVLzmWhND8YjnEX9jkbAWhUuc3GKKrF4U-WPqBqDksjyQewqHThSEBq3HPJpvC6WMZmrkEmwugNjIc4Mox6aFXBkk3Wpw_s4_YfD777k_ULZqd-QUs8W18wNnU150v98HmK_p8KTNwGyDFcfFOB5A2ZezBj9Pvpyr-9TNnc9V7OSud74U7L_-jgFmGw%3D%3D)

name: The Mississippi Republican Party
subject: Will YOU help us Keep Mississippi RED?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mississippi Republican Party
body:
Our southern border has been opened, males are now competing against females for scholarships, and now, Joe Biden is coming after our guns. Fellow Mississippian, Our southern border has been opened, males are now competing against females for scholarships, and now, _Joe Biden is coming after our guns._ The progressive left is dramatically changing America, and it’s affecting our state, our neighborhoods, and our way of life!

**Last week, Joe Biden took executive action, directing Merrick Garland at the Department of Justice to ban gun kits!**

Biden’s federal gun restrictions won't save lives or stop criminals, because the laws only disarm law-abiding citizens.

**_We have to stand up _NOW_ if we want to save our country and preserve freedom for future generations of Americans. _** [**Stand up to Joe Biden’s Gun Grab!**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=af17c0aa83da462a8433b69f63ae7df0&_e=EI7jEwdcglQT5RRjpq7n0gRYgiQ2-76ajqXwQSBuNyltxOCuvCdeXKvhRVnGyxjBbiFJqykgyx9UNb2xrI6R25fSf4l4IF6kSYa3X2IQrw_nw_5utkSlNh3KAW3s7NZ0pE7qPNMn9oA7Wi3oSuGhULEXthQxkbnfSi7iul6wMI8EPIT0mCciAeZ_CsrSz4oWDgVeBrakYron8oi_kPi-KsSiBqJ2t6eWwHsf785XBfkhj_crsPAuZmWEwy6HzobgGKfq9IMPOPO4N_-ocoXTsdPbTd07g9cnAOxT9uOSc_nhdsriLRODaTtnhOncfkN6AwBb1itxjikBO5DcJH_R_V0cUQULTW0wtI9eK1MirYrbIMOVhgbQp1Dp4j7Jy9fwKpwHRWcOXZ3ZK3d2f7dLGg%3D%3D) Big Government Joe knew he couldn’t get his gun control measures through Congress, so he took executive action on his own! This is an extreme act for an American president and yet another liberal power grab by the federal government.

**It’s up to us — _We the People_ must stand up to stop this aggressive executive overreach in its tracks.**

name: Team Samirah
subject: Wanted to update you
body:
The month of March was a BIG one for the team.....

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27780558/281166509/-1282350553?refcode=em210301_launch1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjFlMDQ3Yy0wNDlmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IDAImMVlXWn2v4q4SswXEywaL_rnaBWf39ECruxYjuw=) Hey Derek, we wanted to reach out to make sure you saw the numbers from our first filing deadline! **Team Samirah Samirah reported on April 15 that they raised $116,772.9 in the first quarter of the 2021 Election.** $98,552.91 of this impressive haul came from individual donors, and we’re proud to be running a campaign that is backed by the people -- not the powerful Corporate PACs. The month of March was a BIG one for the team and the filing will show that $109,485.11 was raised in March alone, and none of it would be possible without supporters like you. Earlier this year, Ibraheem pledged to run a clean campaign by swearing off donations from publicly regulated utilities, fossil fuel interests, corporate PACs, and lobbyists that are working against his platform and values -- and he held up this promise as this campaign is powered by grassroots donors just like you. But, the work isn’t over. **The Virginia Democratic Primary is on June 8 and Early voting starts on April 23 in Fairfax County and Loudoun County and our team is hard at work to reach as many voters as possible between now and Election Day.** From the bottom of our hearts here at Team Samirah we say: THANK YOU! The support we’ve received is astounding, and we promise to keep fighting for the progressive values that Ibraheem represents. Best,
Team Samirah | Dr. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is working tirelessly to create a healthier Virginia by building quality affordable housing, an equitable healthcare system and strengthening the base of our democracy. **This team is powered by grassroots donors like you -- not the powerful special interests. So, if you can, chip in today to help us grow this campaign.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27780559/281166510/-1287071472?refcode=210416_numbers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjFlMDQ3Yy0wNDlmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IDAImMVlXWn2v4q4SswXEywaL_rnaBWf39ECruxYjuw=)
---

Herndon, VA 20172

| _**Our Condolences**_ While I typically use this space each week to share the good news about our state and party, last night’s incident at FedEx has caused Hoosiers everywhere to pause and pray. As of this writing, we’re still learning more about what happened and what motivated this senseless act of brutality and I want to express my condolences to the families of the 8 victims and their coworkers at FedEx.

I also want to extend my deepest thanks to our law enforcement officers who, once again, answered the dangerous call, got to the scene, and protected others from further violence. My continued prayers will be with the families of the victims and with our law enforcement community. I encourage you all to join me in sending strength to all those who need it today.

Thanks Kyle
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| _**Governor Holcomb's Statement on Last Night's FedEx Shooting**_
_**"This is another heartbreaking day and I’m shaken by the mass shooting at the FedEx Ground facility in Indianapolis. Indiana State Police are working with local responders and we will continue to offer any and all resources needed to assist during this tragedy. In times like this, words like justice and sorrow fall short in response for those senselessly taken. Our thoughts are with the families, friends, coworkers and all those affected by this terrible situation. Today, I will order that flags be lower to half-staff from now until sunset on Tuesday, April 20 in remembrance of those we've lost."**_
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Gov. Holcomb to speak at The Economic Club of Indiana **_ Mark your calendars! Governor Eric Holcomb will speak via Zoom to the Economic Club of Indiana on April 27. For more details and to register for the webinar, click here: [https://www.economicclubofindiana.com/product/april-2021-luncheon/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b4a14c34ea&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Get Well Soon**_ Former Vice President Mike Pence underwent surgery earlier this week to have a pacemaker implanted. The routine surgery was a success and Mike is expected to fully recover in the coming days. We’re wishing Mike well on his road to recovery and sending our prayers to him, Karen and the entire Pence family! Get well soon Mike!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Ramadan Message from RNC**_ We wanted to share and echo the Republican National Committee’s wishes for a Happy Ramadan to all Hoosiers observing this holy month.
_**“As tonight marks the beginning of Ramadan for Muslims around the world, we wish everyone observing a blessed and bright month ahead. We are inspired by our friends in the Muslim-American community practicing this period of fasting and spiritual discipline, and it is an invitation for all Americans, particularly during this unprecedented time in our history, to increase our devotion to prayer and adopt the same spirit of charity that defines this holy month.” -RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel. **_
---
|
---
| _**RIP Bobby "Slick" Leonard**_ Indiana basketball legend Bobby “Slick” Leonard passed away earlier this week. Governor Holcomb issued this statement on the loss of a Hoosier icon: **_“Slick Leonard is an Indiana icon. He was the embodiment of basketball with his wide-ranging career starting with his days as a high school player in Terre Haute, going on to Indiana University to win a college national championship, and then his career with the NBA as a player, coach, broadcaster, and savior of the Indiana Pacers. His presence in the arena and in our state will be deeply missed. You can’t find anyone who doesn’t love Slick.”_**
---
|
---
| _**Wall Street Journal Calls Central Indiana a “Beacon” for Jobs**_ Under strong Republican leadership, Central Indiana has become a beacon for job seekers. According to the Wall Street Journal, workers gravitated to Indiana due to the job opportunities, lower costs and a quieter lifestyle. Proving that more and more people continue to discover that Indiana is the best place to live, work, play & stay.

Read the full article here: [https://www.wsj.com/articles/where-can-you-find-a-new-job-try-these-u-s-cities-11617960612](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7181db9c10&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |

The radical left thought they could get away with it. They thought they could do whatever they wanted. They thought they could run elections in a partisan and unfair way. **_But they didn 't count on Pete Snyder standing up to them._**

Pete is committed to ensuring trust in our election process.**In fact, Pete has an election integrity plan. **

Pete's plan is to make sure every American can feel confident in our election system again. It will ensure accountability and transparency with policies like photo IDs at the polls, signature match absentee ballots, voter fraud reporting tools, and more.

**Show your commitment to new leadership and election integrity by becoming an Official Pete Supporter today!** **[**CHIP IN TO HELP SECURE OUR ELECTIONS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wt96xhcan6i1TYdaBruEJobGMOK7WNHt8a4VfR07qG5SGrpyx9PW4SfEFROBwJPQXL24jfNXDkvSVLGmMiMfVzhO9a3FY7qGLuNecTkIVlGUo1btBgThvJj0RElMIcQb6CRzBWzRPIvySvgD1Hemxqb0LWAyU8nhXNdEw5H49i-k1EAAWvhdBOxy1b7WH9H8PxC8zJXxlOFIr8eielKHeP62ILoGKo_mtunWYvMfCxwIgkDPY8pCb0kZD8ZngXUamqJ11cIHlq5emGaFidSb56N9D_KdZL8mc2Ni68AVzsk_bTSAdQrxo95CtQ0aZQAx2YV7NH_UkTxMzHjjBKpuer9RoDTgSE1DWfCauKgzWjo4fFGkTAyOxpFoVmw7rPhD77vFy3hLBZ4_SUEu4OqQw0dnqKatbwm6VsUBztQh3mLM_vwCNRQ2_CjhLpuErh1GoTV87mfMiGLoGSKx5aky9g==&c=PjW9MmdXqrHCvLRovUzYatmhRVpJCNSJ4bY1eBfDD7yT_O06lx3e2Q==&ch=zPYHblw3NWCxQVcFGx-YTriwlKYgCH7ymWIyIkp_GEKEjy2g-leMGg==)** Virginians should not have to question whether their vote is fairly counted. Our system only works when the American people trust that their vote and voice matters. It will take real leadership to get this done and that's where Pete comes in.

Pete Snyder is the conservative candidate that the left is afraid of -- because they know he won't back down. He has plans to renew Virginia and protect our state from the radical left, and he will do whatever it takes to put Virginians first.

**[Will you show your support by joining Pete's team?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wt96xhcan6i1TYdaBruEJobGMOK7WNHt8a4VfR07qG5SGrpyx9PW4SfEFROBwJPQXL24jfNXDkvSVLGmMiMfVzhO9a3FY7qGLuNecTkIVlGUo1btBgThvJj0RElMIcQb6CRzBWzRPIvySvgD1Hemxqb0LWAyU8nhXNdEw5H49i-k1EAAWvhdBOxy1b7WH9H8PxC8zJXxlOFIr8eielKHeP62ILoGKo_mtunWYvMfCxwIgkDPY8pCb0kZD8ZngXUamqJ11cIHlq5emGaFidSb56N9D_KdZL8mc2Ni68AVzsk_bTSAdQrxo95CtQ0aZQAx2YV7NH_UkTxMzHjjBKpuer9RoDTgSE1DWfCauKgzWjo4fFGkTAyOxpFoVmw7rPhD77vFy3hLBZ4_SUEu4OqQw0dnqKatbwm6VsUBztQh3mLM_vwCNRQ2_CjhLpuErh1GoTV87mfMiGLoGSKx5aky9g==&c=PjW9MmdXqrHCvLRovUzYatmhRVpJCNSJ4bY1eBfDD7yT_O06lx3e2Q==&ch=zPYHblw3NWCxQVcFGx-YTriwlKYgCH7ymWIyIkp_GEKEjy2g-leMGg==)** [](https://) **[**CHIP IN TODAY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wt96xhcan6i1TYdaBruEJobGMOK7WNHt8a4VfR07qG5SGrpyx9PW4SfEFROBwJPQXL24jfNXDkvSVLGmMiMfVzhO9a3FY7qGLuNecTkIVlGUo1btBgThvJj0RElMIcQb6CRzBWzRPIvySvgD1Hemxqb0LWAyU8nhXNdEw5H49i-k1EAAWvhdBOxy1b7WH9H8PxC8zJXxlOFIr8eielKHeP62ILoGKo_mtunWYvMfCxwIgkDPY8pCb0kZD8ZngXUamqJ11cIHlq5emGaFidSb56N9D_KdZL8mc2Ni68AVzsk_bTSAdQrxo95CtQ0aZQAx2YV7NH_UkTxMzHjjBKpuer9RoDTgSE1DWfCauKgzWjo4fFGkTAyOxpFoVmw7rPhD77vFy3hLBZ4_SUEu4OqQw0dnqKatbwm6VsUBztQh3mLM_vwCNRQ2_CjhLpuErh1GoTV87mfMiGLoGSKx5aky9g==&c=PjW9MmdXqrHCvLRovUzYatmhRVpJCNSJ4bY1eBfDD7yT_O06lx3e2Q==&ch=zPYHblw3NWCxQVcFGx-YTriwlKYgCH7ymWIyIkp_GEKEjy2g-leMGg==)** Thank you,

subject: BREAKING: Friend, Joe Biden is going to pack the court.

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Social Media Update: Important News
body:
| | | | We must take a stand against Big Tech and the hopelessly-biased media.
---
---
Dear Peter,
Yesterday, Twitter took another step toward silencing influential conservatives.
James O’Keefe, a conservative grassroots icon, was banned for exposing the fake-news tactics of CNN.
As you know, my Office has filed lawsuits against multiple social media companies, when they have engaged in anti-competitive conduct.

clean_body: | | | | We must take a stand against Big Tech and the hopelessly-biased media. Dear Peter, Yesterday, Twitter took another step toward silencing influential conservatives. James O’Keefe, a conservative grassroots icon, was banned for exposing the fake-news tactics of CNN. As you know, my Office has filed lawsuits against multiple social media companies, when they have engaged in anti-competitive conduct. Please consider following our alternative social media accounts as we don't know whether we may face a similar ban in the future. Here are our channels: Thank you. Keep the faith. We hope things will get better soon. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. name: John Burke
subject: Back to Basics in California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Hope is not lost in the Golden State — we just need to get back to basics. Read more >>
Peter, California is a mess right now. We’ve been the butt of late-night jokes, fumbled the pandemic, and now have record numbers of people and businesses leaving.
_**But hope is not gone for the Golden State.**_ Kevin Faulconer knows that the promise of California is still there, and he’s running for governor because he believes in a California Comeback. Fixing what’s wrong in California isn’t about party lines. It’s about getting back to basics. You don’t have to be on the left or the right side of the aisle to want commonsense policies that get our homeless off the streets, make sure our communities are protected by good law enforcement officers, and give our kids the best education possible. **National Review just published a[fantastic article](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d307842870942504/c4c1f568021000bdc3d6b838967d376c/34943) about Kevin and why he’s the best candidate we have to get California back on track and first in the nation once again.** **[Will you please read it and share with your family and friends?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d307842870942504/c617014a234b548ac3d6b838967d376c/34943)** It is critical that our government get back to the basics. California has failed our citizens with a decade of one-party rule in Sacramento, and it’s time to get back to the business of making our state the land of golden opportunities for the next generation. Hope is alive and well in California. It’s time for a proven leader like Kevin Faulconer to get the government back to basics and get us back on track. Kevin cleaned up corruption as the Mayor of San Diego, and he is ready to do it for the whole state as our next governor. Thanks,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d307842870942504/1a5e3d0957a344ffc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d307842870942504/7088c49485d7b5fbc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d307842870942504/ae0cbf5b396245d2c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Moms for Childcare
subject: fwd: we have set up a Childcare Fund for our candidates
body:
This has never been done before. Moms in Office is paving the way again with innovative support programs to get more moms elected. We need you to help us fund this program so that we can make this a reality. Hi Peter, A mom’s voice is an undeniable asset when creating policy that impacts our children, our families and our future. Yet, too many barriers keep women, especially moms, out of elected positions. Campaigning for an elected position is a full time, unpaid job. As such, many qualified women with caregiving responsibilities don’t run for office. They can't afford to give up their jobs and take care of their families, all while running a campaign. **PACs underfund women-- in 2020 PACs contributed $336.7 million to men and $132.7 million to women candidates.** Moms in Office is committed to endorse, fund, and elect women candidates with caregiving responsibilities. Although women candidates often match and even outraise men, women remain at a structural disadvantage because it costs more to win as a woman. **Here is how we are changing the game. ** For the first time ever, Moms in Office partnered up with a company to establish a Childcare Fund. This will allow us to pay for our endorsed candidates' childcare expenses while campaigning. **[Would you pay into our Childcare Fund to help us elect more women?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27782143/281170657/600483780?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YTM1NjFiLTBjOWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SVHQ4R9_51JSB_28D7P1QvhjcN2vn7_ZDryqXXJ96qc=)** I would not be asking you directly if this was not so important, Peter. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27782144/281170658/600483780?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YTM1NjFiLTBjOWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SVHQ4R9_51JSB_28D7P1QvhjcN2vn7_ZDryqXXJ96qc=)We have been given an opportunity to level the playing field and make a difference for women running for office. Can I count on you today? If you could chip in today, this would mean the world to me. [**Chip in for 1 hour of childcare**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforchildcare?amount=25) [**Chip in for 5 hours of childcare**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforchildcare?amount=100) [**Fund childcare for 1 candidate**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27782146/281170660/600483780?amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YTM1NjFiLTBjOWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SVHQ4R9_51JSB_28D7P1QvhjcN2vn7_ZDryqXXJ96qc=) [**Fund Childcare for 3 candidates**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27782147/281170661/600483780?amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YTM1NjFiLTBjOWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SVHQ4R9_51JSB_28D7P1QvhjcN2vn7_ZDryqXXJ96qc=) [**Fund childcare for this quarter**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27782148/281170662/600483780?amount=500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YTM1NjFiLTBjOWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SVHQ4R9_51JSB_28D7P1QvhjcN2vn7_ZDryqXXJ96qc=) [**Childcare Champion full cycle**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27782149/281170663/600483780?amount=5000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YTM1NjFiLTBjOWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SVHQ4R9_51JSB_28D7P1QvhjcN2vn7_ZDryqXXJ96qc=) Thank you for all of your help! | [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=992eaa570992424981cfbd011ce53157&_e=_a_1qryKfoW3n8bxNP5uaVRn05_4reTe5e-NbtVeHBKOaesjVGb6Kf1RL-VOmORYCAQvz7irP55c8lP13C_FGtHNjI4MpD2tRGLyjTRkLjGuS9WOQMyCDFoxMRDyT6FULsOnySAvshXIEqjLQNk_WyHgk2Q9N-3v884vI91J6pB3_4D7C8wUQ-uvaVGzniM0-dFyC0-hFRvM2S_N4eNojmlC6AgmeJXoQ-SaFdIFF1qqQQb4eVYcSoefPJG7SZi6dEN5_XzHi3-DZpXUfrU6tcXTj0g2NjQGywrgpPnjvgsALmnutaqpUsbNiJEA60KL44btH4UTlphv9NlBI43Q88i0VWGSZV4y9OlrUeU-MSgY6ctKBIqRGtgbvGlkxB-Hovrart6tt21GEpJp8HVZOfo7mdojFPpNVxhfLDTocXi4680sbanVtoyGafr1FjZp_jkFkjKagYsU8ays6Xim8hQ1iu_TUdhB7QdMNJf6Xu2f4cZyKQoZ5_TR26sJ58A1)
---

Friend,

**It's the middle of April and the southern border is continually flooded with illegal immigrants and tons of drugs, allowing for drug cartels to make a massive profit.**

**_Our communities will no longer be safe if we continue to ignore_** the dire situation at the southern border. Drugs will soon infiltrate our towns and cities, creating a path for far greater problems that communities do not need, especially following a pandemic.

Also still lurking is Joe Biden’s impending attack on the Second Amendment, and a potential gun-grab!

The stakes have never been higher— we **MUST RETAKE THE SENATE** and put a stop to this unchecked liberal power!

Note from Chairman Stepanek
**Derek,**

**Congratulations to Representative-Elect Bill Boyd on his successful campaign against Wendy Thomas, in the Merrimack Special Election this past Tuesday! What a testament to our unified Republican efforts, and to the dedication of volunteers who helped us spread awareness of Bill’s candidacy. I look forward to seeing Bill pick up the torch of our beloved Speaker Dick Hinch, and to honorably represent the district through his term. Thanks to all who joined us in our efforts - You played a key role in ensuring this election was a success! **

**If you were unable to help in the Merrimack Special election but wanted to be involved, keep your eyes open for information regarding the next special election taking place in Merrimack County’s 23rd District. **

**Finally, we have a terrific event coming up on May 6th. The NHGOP is hosting a reception with Corey Lewandowski in honor of his latest publication, Trump: America First. General admission attendees will receive a signed copy of his book, and VIP ticket purchases include an additional photo reception.[This event is limited capacity, so be sure to sign up before tickets run out! ](http://email.nhgop.org/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S5Pq3iVE4OD59T9yAdEPR7LUBqzfiVx5cWgyEkhlwXD2wfRyMMQlAbiWYxS3CPhvXPkhEEnogwHtfvGq5sKPRS4-3DqlFj_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95HIDFJ6jqgZT4CFuKo3ej8CC42IJg3OtSxxF16sbejxJEOwGiFQbajxB8gZ7isnBhBHoUTuT9-2FbU2l3l32PV8-2BWdrltvHAIi3ZgIN3BokJ9isUWH4OjXDDWOCVSOA43usWdVKLbNBl-2FRpppQZg7znDNGOAGyBwM2eozO5b8efQuTF-2BQ0HFI5cuw2V6lkqyNLHKH-2F0cWmOTQqoGbaijYtARKiuMpQUoK8xgZawFdFAjvx-2Fn7-2FmX94ijGDhThWYnoVxQ7-2FEgKKDVYVeVyIIXA9FSaQ-3D-3D)**

Senate Update from Senate President Morse
**Senate Report Card- Straight As!**

This week, the New Hampshire Senate focused on education, passing a series of bills that would help improve our schools and give parents and students more tools to seek out the best education possible.

American Civics - HB 320 would require New Hampshire students to pass the civics naturalization examination developed by the 2020 United States Citizen and Immigration Services. We should ensure that anyone earning a high school diploma is an informed and prepared citizen. This test covers basic American history and government, such as the name of the first President, the role of three branches of government, and the protections included in the Bill of Rights.

Adequacy Standards - HB 242 amends the content of an adequate education, providing basic minimum standards for biology, physical science, earth science, civics and government, economics, geography, history, and personal finance literacy. We need to ensure that our students receive the core academic knowledge to prepare them to thrive in adulthood.

Academic Innovation - HB 609 would create Innovation Schools, giving local school officials the option to seek waivers from state requirements in order to create new ways to educate our students. By unleashing the power of innovation, we can give local school boards and administrators the flexibility to create methods of instruction, new courses, and whole new ways to reach students who are struggling under our calcified educational bureaucracy.

Assessment - HB 194 would enable the state Department of Education to share results from our annual assessment exams with parents whose school districts are reluctant to share this data in a timely manner. Parents need to know how their children are doing in order to make decisions about their educational futures. HB 194 would help give every parent more information about their children's academic progress.

In addition to the Education Freedom Accounts created under SB 130, these bills represent an education reform agenda that can revitalize New Hampshire schools and empower parents to make the right choices for every New Hampshire student.
|

**_Republican Spotlight: Meet Merrimack Town Chair Ginger Heald_**
In this week’s republican spotlight, we will be highlighting Ginger Heald. Ginger is a N.H native, having grown up in Nashua, and now resides in the town of Merrimack. She served as vice chair to the Merrimack Republicans’ last cycle, and is now Chair of the committee.

Ginger played an integral role in the 2020 election cycle, organizing community members in support of a unified Republican ticket. Through Merrimack’s most recent special election, she continued to demonstrate leadership by gathering volunteers, helping voter contact efforts, and organizing election day operations.

We would like to thank Ginger for everything she has done to support local Republican candidates. It is individuals like Ginger who help ensure successful Republican candidates, and we are grateful to have her support.

Again, thank you Ginger!

NH Republican House Update:

**House Speaker Congratulates Winner of Special Election**

**Concord, NH** – House Speaker Sherman Packard (R-Londonderry) released the following statement after the Special Election race for the House Hillsborough County District 21 seat.

Congratulations to Bill Boyd on his well-earned win in Tuesday's Special election. I am confident Bill will fight for the people of Merrimack and make sure their best interests are represented. His enthusiasm in improving the Granite State and ensuring it remains a great place for families, businesses and consumers makes him an excellent addition to the NH House of Representatives. With his help, we will continue working hard for the People of NH, and keep our promise by lowering taxes, eliminating wasteful spending, and putting money back into the pockets of our constituents.

###

**House Majority Leader Congratulates Bill Boyd**

**Concord, NH-** House Majority Leader Jason Osborne (R-Auburn) released the following statement after Bill Boyd's special election victory in Merrimack to fill the seat of late Speaker Dick Hinch.

"I'd like to congratulate Bill Boyd on his successful and hard fought campaign. Losing in Merrimack was never an option, and we had a tall order against liberal, deep-pocket, out of state special interests that attempted to buy the election. We set out to ensure Speaker Hinch's seat remained in Republican hands, we remained united, and committed to our goal."

"For the last decade Bill has advocated for his constituents on the town council, and he will bring that same energy and enthusiasm to Concord to continue the fight on behalf of Merrimack. Tonight I'm thrilled to welcome Bill Boyd to the Republican caucus. With his help we will continue to improve the Granite State."

**NHFRW is founding a new 'Lakes Region' Club! **
|
---
** **
**The New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women is so excited to announce that we are starting another club! This will be our second new club this year. Support for our current clubs along with new club development is crucial to being organized for our 2022 get-out-the-vote efforts! **

**The Lakes Region FRW is having their organizational meeting on April 20 at 7pm to elect their Executive Officers and approve their Bylaws. They need 10 female members to join for $35 as founding members to start their club! The Lakes Region FRW will aim to represent women in any town in the "lakes region" of NH and will be based in Belknap County. **

clean_body: | | secure.nh.gop secure.nh.gop mailto:info@nhgop.org?subject=re:%20Newsletter&body= Today's Newsletter Highlights | Chairman's Note Weekly Glance at Governor Chris Sununu Senate Update from Senator Chuck Morse Judicial Alert! Upcoming Events Republican Spotlight: Merrimack Town GOP Chair Ginger Heald House Republican Update NHFRW Update NHGOP Tweets | Note from Chairman Stepanek Derek, Congratulations to Representative-Elect Bill Boyd on his successful campaign against Wendy Thomas, in the Merrimack Special Election this past Tuesday! What a testament to our unified Republican efforts, and to the dedication of volunteers who helped us spread awareness of Bill’s candidacy. I look forward to seeing Bill pick up the torch of our beloved Speaker Dick Hinch, and to honorably represent the district through his term. Thanks to all who joined us in our efforts - You played a key role in ensuring this election was a success! If you were unable to help in the Merrimack Special election but wanted to be involved, keep your eyes open for information regarding the next special election taking place in Merrimack County’s 23rd District. Finally, we have a terrific event coming up on May 6th. The NHGOP is hosting a reception with Corey Lewandowski in honor of his latest publication, Trump: America First. General admission attendees will receive a signed copy of his book, and VIP ticket purchases include an additional photo reception. As a reminder, please encourage folks to subscribe to our newsletter, and if there’s anything you would like us to highlight, please reach out to info@nhgop.org! Sincerely, Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chairman | | Weekly Governor's Glance: To learn more about the Governor's efforts, click the link to his website below | THREAD: As fatalities continue to decline, as hospitalizations remain manageable, and as vaccinations continue to increase, the state’s mask mandate will not be renewed tomorrow. -- Chris Sununu (@GovChrisSununu) | Senate Update from Senate President Morse Senate Report Card- Straight As! This week, the New Hampshire Senate focused on education, passing a series of bills that would help improve our schools and give parents and students more tools to seek out the best education possible. American Civics - HB 320 would require New Hampshire students to pass the civics naturalization examination developed by the 2020 United States Citizen and Immigration Services. We should ensure that anyone earning a high school diploma is an informed and prepared citizen. This test covers basic American history and government, such as the name of the first President, the role of three branches of government, and the protections included in the Bill of Rights. Adequacy Standards - HB 242 amends the content of an adequate education, providing basic minimum standards for biology, physical science, earth science, civics and government, economics, geography, history, and personal finance literacy. We need to ensure that our students receive the core academic knowledge to prepare them to thrive in adulthood. Academic Innovation - HB 609 would create Innovation Schools, giving local school officials the option to seek waivers from state requirements in order to create new ways to educate our students. By unleashing the power of innovation, we can give local school boards and administrators the flexibility to create methods of instruction, new courses, and whole new ways to reach students who are struggling under our calcified educational bureaucracy. Assessment - HB 194 would enable the state Department of Education to share results from our annual assessment exams with parents whose school districts are reluctant to share this data in a timely manner. Parents need to know how their children are doing in order to make decisions about their educational futures. HB 194 would help give every parent more information about their children's academic progress. In addition to the Education Freedom Accounts created under SB 130, these bills represent an education reform agenda that can revitalize New Hampshire schools and empower parents to make the right choices for every New Hampshire student. | Judicial Alert! Breaking News: President Biden will create a panel to study expanding the Supreme Court in an effort to balance the conservative majority created by Donald Trump. -- The New York Times (@nytimes) | Follow our State House Accounts: | | Upcoming Events | | May 6th (6pm) NHGOP Reception Featuring Corey Lewandowski July 17th (10am-3pm) Hillsborough County Machine Gun Shoot | Republican Spotlight: Meet Merrimack Town Chair Ginger Heald In this week’s republican spotlight, we will be highlighting Ginger Heald. Ginger is a N.H native, having grown up in Nashua, and now resides in the town of Merrimack. She served as vice chair to the Merrimack Republicans’ last cycle, and is now Chair of the committee. Ginger played an integral role in the 2020 election cycle, organizing community members in support of a unified Republican ticket. Through Merrimack’s most recent special election, she continued to demonstrate leadership by gathering volunteers, helping voter contact efforts, and organizing election day operations. We would like to thank Ginger for everything she has done to support local Republican candidates. It is individuals like Ginger who help ensure successful Republican candidates, and we are grateful to have her support. Again, thank you Ginger! NH Republican House Update: House Speaker Congratulates Winner of Special Election Concord, NH – House Speaker Sherman Packard (R-Londonderry) released the following statement after the Special Election race for the House Hillsborough County District 21 seat. Congratulations to Bill Boyd on his well-earned win in Tuesday's Special election. I am confident Bill will fight for the people of Merrimack and make sure their best interests are represented. His enthusiasm in improving the Granite State and ensuring it remains a great place for families, businesses and consumers makes him an excellent addition to the NH House of Representatives. With his help, we will continue working hard for the People of NH, and keep our promise by lowering taxes, eliminating wasteful spending, and putting money back into the pockets of our constituents. House Majority Leader Congratulates Bill Boyd Concord, NH- House Majority Leader Jason Osborne (R-Auburn) released the following statement after Bill Boyd's special election victory in Merrimack to fill the seat of late Speaker Dick Hinch. "I'd like to congratulate Bill Boyd on his successful and hard fought campaign. Losing in Merrimack was never an option, and we had a tall order against liberal, deep-pocket, out of state special interests that attempted to buy the election. We set out to ensure Speaker Hinch's seat remained in Republican hands, we remained united, and committed to our goal." "For the last decade Bill has advocated for his constituents on the town council, and he will bring that same energy and enthusiasm to Concord to continue the fight on behalf of Merrimack. Tonight I'm thrilled to welcome Bill Boyd to the Republican caucus. With his help we will continue to improve the Granite State." For more House updates, click below to subscribe to their newsletter! | NHFRW is founding a new 'Lakes Region' Club! | The New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women is so excited to announce that we are starting another club! This will be our second new club this year. Support for our current clubs along with new club development is crucial to being organized for our 2022 get-out-the-vote efforts! The Lakes Region FRW is having their organizational meeting on April 20 at 7pm to elect their Executive Officers and approve their Bylaws. They need 10 female members to join for $35 as founding members to start their club! The Lakes Region FRW will aim to represent women in any town in the "lakes region" of NH and will be based in Belknap County. | NHGOP Tweets: | | | | ---|---|--- | | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 |

body:
Our right to vote is under attack across the country and if you are a Democrat, this is the time to fight back and fight for HR1. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27786135/281198773/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliNDNiNDVjLTI3OWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tPvRff0Rf0tv6bvR1jA1trz76uNQjfu88i3d-v15PWo=&emci=382bc5cc-1b9f-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=9b43b45c-279f-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=2884131) **Fight back and fight for HR1...** Peter, Republicans across the country are restricting our access to the ballot box by passing voter suppression bills at the state level. These measures are intentionally designed by the GOP to make it harder for people to vote-- especially people of color. [**How can you fight back? You can rush a split donation to Moms in Office and Fair Fight to help us elect progressive women and leaders who will fight for our right to vote in Congress.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27786136/281198774/200467634?amount=$50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliNDNiNDVjLTI3OWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tPvRff0Rf0tv6bvR1jA1trz76uNQjfu88i3d-v15PWo=) This is not the time to sit on the sidelines, Peter. Five voter suppression bills have already been signed into law-- in Georgia, Iowa, Arkansas, and Utah. According to a report by the **[Brennan Center for Justice](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27786137/281198775/168711392?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliNDNiNDVjLTI3OWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tPvRff0Rf0tv6bvR1jA1trz76uNQjfu88i3d-v15PWo=&emci=382bc5cc-1b9f-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=9b43b45c-279f-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=2884131)** , 361 bills to make it harder to vote have been introduced in 47 states in the first three months of this year. [**RUSH A DONATION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27786139/281198777/200467634?refcode=0416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliNDNiNDVjLTI3OWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tPvRff0Rf0tv6bvR1jA1trz76uNQjfu88i3d-v15PWo=) Now is the time to fight back and fight for HR 1-- the House-passed comprehensive voting rights bills. All of us are responsible to ensure that every American has the right to vote. We are doing so by funding progressive women across the country and by supporting organizations like Fair Fight. This is why Moms in Office set an ambitious goal to raise $5,000 over the next 24 hours for Stacey Abrams' Fair Fight PAC. Thank you for supporting our work. We urgently need more leaders in Congress like Senator Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff. **[With your help, we can stand with Stacey now, a true leader who puts protecting our right to vote at the center of her agenda.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27786141/281198779/200467634?refcode=0416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliNDNiNDVjLTI3OWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tPvRff0Rf0tv6bvR1jA1trz76uNQjfu88i3d-v15PWo=)** -Moms in Office [**RUSH A DONATION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27786143/281198781/200467634?refcode=0416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliNDNiNDVjLTI3OWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tPvRff0Rf0tv6bvR1jA1trz76uNQjfu88i3d-v15PWo=) Moms in Office
